channel.title: Research Radar — Daily Briefing
channel.description: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar. Generated automatically; voice is OpenAI TTS.
channel.itunes:author: Prof. Liangkai Liu
channel.itunes:summary: Daily ~6-minute audio briefing of the autonomy-systems research radar.

item.title: Research Radar — Tue May 12: Focus on AI Platforms and Multi-Agent Frameworks Emerges
item.description: Today's items highlight a surge in open-source AI platforms and frameworks designed for multi-agent workflows and LLM integration. Projects like SGLang and MLflow emphasize the growing need for robust infrastructure to support complex AI applications.
